name: Season Kickoff Practice
note: Meet the team, event assignments, goal-setting.

name: Study Groups Begin
note: Break into event pairs, start resource building.

name: Scrimmage #1 (Internal)
note: First timed mock tournament. Score and review.

name: SD Fall Invitational
where: UC San Diego, La Jolla CA
note: First official invitational — all 5 teams competing.

name: Scrimmage #2 (Internal)
note: Focus on weak events. Timed trials for build events.

name: Pre-Winter Practice Sprint
note: Final practice before winter break. Review all events.

name: Winter Study Week
note: Optional focused study sessions over break.

name: Scrimmage #3 (Full Sim)
note: Full competition simulation. Official scoring rubrics.

name: Build Event Finals Prep
note: Outdoor runs for Hovercraft, Electric Vehicle, Helicopter.

name: SD Regional Tournament
note: Official SOINC Regional. All 5 teams competing.

name: California State Tournament
note: State Championship — top qualifying teams from Regionals.
